author: Taako
name: yalc
install_msg: Thanks for installing YALC! Use `[p]yalc setup`, then open YALC in Red-Web-Dashboard for complete event routing, privacy, audit, and journal controls.
short: Audit-aware server logging with complete dashboard control.
description: A comprehensive Discord logger with strict audit attribution, cached and raw gateway coverage, fail-closed delivery, per-event routes and colors, advanced filters, and an optional searchable local journal.
end_user_data_statement: YALC stores guild logging settings, channel and role IDs, ignore-rule user IDs, and short voice-session history. Its optional local event journal stores event metadata such as actor/target IDs, timestamps, summaries, and audit IDs for the configured retention period; message content is excluded unless a guild administrator explicitly enables content storage. Journal data can be searched, exported, pruned, or cleared, and Red data-deletion requests remove references to the requesting user.
